query: Resp18 regulated endocrine specific protein neuroendocrine hypothalamus pituitary

results.title: Regulated Endocrine-Specific Protein-18, an Emerging Endocrine Protein in Physiology: A Literature Review
results.snippet: Regulated endocrine-specific protein-18 (RESP18), a novel 18-kDa protein, was first identified in neuroendocrine tissue.

results.title: Regulated endocrine-specific protein 18 (RESP18) is localized to and regulated in A-like cells and G-cells in rat stomach
results.snippet: The regulated endocrine-specific protein 18 (RESP18) has previously been localized to different endocrine cells and neurons, in particular the pituitary gland and hypothalamus.

results.title: Regulated endocrine-specific protein-18: a short-lived novel glucocorticoid-regulated endocrine protein
results.snippet: Regulated endocrine-specific protein-18 (RESP18) is an 18-kilodalton endocrine-specific transcript whose expression is regulated by a number of different physiological and pharmacological stimuli in different tissues.

results.title: A novel neuroendocrine intracellular signaling pathway
results.snippet: Expression of many components of the secretory pathway in peptidergic neuroendocrine cells is precisely controlled in response to secretagogues.
